name: WSKZ2026 S17 - Module D
description: Build a responsive SPA for an online classifieds platform that consumes the Module C REST API. Implement authentication, profile management with password change, advert workflows with status handling, public advert browsing with filters, advert details with a carousel and phone reveal, and a modular VIP/TOP paid-services purchase interface using the provided OpenAPI specification and Postman collection.
